text:
The web search results conclusively confirm that the cited reference is authentic. Multiple sources confirm the exact publication:

- The official book website (deeplearningbook.org) shows the BibTeX entry matching the citation exactly
- MIT Press official website lists this book
- Amazon, Google Books, and Apple Books all list the book with these three authors and this publisher
- Academic databases (Semantic Scholar, ResearchGate) contain records for this book

The automated checker's report of "C. Wick" as the actual author appears to be a mismatch error—the checker likely matched a different work with the same or similar title. The cited reference itself is correct: the book "Deep Learning" by Ian Goodfellow, Yoshua Bengio, and Aaron Courville was published by MIT Press in 2016.

EXPLANATION: The exact book "Deep Learning" by Ian Goodfellow, Yoshua Bengio, and Aaron Courville was published by MIT Press in 2016, as confirmed by the official book website and multiple retailer listings. The automated checker's metadata mismatch indicates it incorrectly matched a different work.
LINK: https://www.deeplearningbook.org/
FOUND_TITLE: Deep Learning
FOUND_AUTHORS: Ian Goodfellow, Yoshua Bengio, Aaron Courville
FOUND_YEAR: 2016
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
